issue.title: www.wired.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.wired.com/account/profile/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wired.com%2Faccount%2Fprofile%2F) ### Comment > Parts of wired.com do not work correctly with AdGuard enabled. For this specific case, the account profile page is missing almost all of its content. Wired.com appears to be unable to get the user's subscription status when AdGuard is turned on. (This affects other pages as well.) ``` Username: @kaiyoma ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/sq39w0opa684k40080c4o0c4kgk48o87kdn4k3yh8s.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/75l60mct5n8cww0ok40o8s88gw0s80o4dfknxyyd60.png?nc=1)

Block trackers,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking methods**:

Self-destructing first-party cookies (4320)

AdGuard Cookie Notices Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.2&system_version=Android+16&browser=chrome&filters=11.19.21.22.4.20.2.3.18&dns_servers=System&userscripts=https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.filters=https%253A%252F%252Ffilters.adtidy.org%252Fandroid%252Ffilters%252F15_optimized.txt&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid&dns.timeout=5000)

comment.body:
> [@kaiyoma](https://github.com/kaiyoma) Was tracking protection disabled during the check? Not sure if we can help without a subscription. With free account I can't read that article even without AdGuard.

I had disabled all filters, but left the "big button" turned on. That was still causing interference with the operation of the website.
